<recipe>
  <title>Spicy Tofu Stir-Fry</title>
  <author>
    <name>Maya Chen</name>
    <contact>
      <email>maya.chen@example.com</email>
    </contact>
  </author>
  <ingredients>
    <ingredient>
      <name>firm tofu</name>
      <quantity>200</quantity>
      <unit>grams</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>bell peppers</name>
      <quantity>1</quantity>
      <unit>medium, sliced</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>onions</name>
      <quantity>1</quantity>
      <unit>large, thinly sliced</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>garlic cloves</name>
      <quantity>4</quantity>
      <unit>cloves, minced</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>soy sauce</name>
      <quantity>3</quantity>
      <unit>tablespoons</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>rice vinegar</name>
      <quantity>1</quantity>
      <unit>tablespoon</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>sesame oil</name>
      <quantity>1</quantity>
      <unit>teaspoon</unit>
    </ingredient>
    <ingredient>
      <name>red chili flakes</name>
      <quantity>1</quantity>
      <unit>teaspoon</unit>
    </ingredient>
  </ingredients>
  <steps>
    <step>
      <order>1</order>
      <instruction>Heat a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.</instruction>
      <minutes>5</minutes>
    </step>
    <step>
      <order>2</order>
      <instruction>Pat dry the firm tofu and cut it into 1-inch cubes.</instruction>
      <minutes>3</minutes>
    </step>
    <step>
      <order>3</order>
      <instruction>Add the tofu cubes to the hot wok and stir-fry for 3–4 minutes, or until the tofu is golden and slightly crispy.</instruction>
      <minutes>4</minutes>
    </step>
    <step>
      <order>4</order>
      <instruction>While the tofu is cooking, add the sliced bell peppers, thinly sliced onions, and minced garlic to the wok. Stir-fry for 2–3 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender-crisp.</instruction>
      <minutes>3</minutes>
    </step>
    <step>
      <order>5</order>
      <instruction>Stir in the soy sauce and rice vinegar. Continue to stir-fry for 1–2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly and coats the tofu and vegetables.</instruction>
      <minutes>2</minutes>
    </step>
    <step>
      <order>6</order>
      <instruction>Remove the wok from heat and let the sauce settle for 1 minute. Then, serve the spicy tofu stir-fry hot, garnished with a sprinkle of red chili flakes and a few sesame seeds.</instruction>
      <minutes>1</minutes>
    </step>
  </steps>
  <duration>
    <minutes>30</minutes>
  </duration>
  <nutrition>
    <calories>320</calories>
    <fat>
      <grams>12</grams>
    </fat>
    <protein>
      <grams>28</grams>
    </protein>
    <carbohydrates>
      <grams>45</grams>
    </carbohydrates>
  </nutrition>
